steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject is many works, a plural noun. The phrase particularly one abstract cubist painting by Marcel Duchamp is a parenthetical aside set off by dashes; it does not change the subject. The blank is the main verb, and it must agree with many works in number and fit the past-tense context established by at the time.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'was': singular past tense. The subject many works is plural, so was violates subject-verb agreement. ✗
  • Choice B — 'were': plural past tense. Agrees with many works and matches the past-time frame. ✓
  • Choice C — 'has been': singular present-perfect. Fails on both number (singular) and tense (present-perfect does not fit the past context of the 1913 show). ✗
  • Choice D — 'is': singular present tense. Wrong number and wrong tense. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
